description: Empty capability for external-URL webview windows. No oxplow commands, no plugin access — these webviews behave like sandboxed browser tabs. The label pattern matches the webview opened via `open_external_url` (label = ext-url-<random>); per Tauri 2 best practice we target the webview label, not the parent window — the two share the same label when built via WebviewWindowBuilder, so this is more precise without losing scope.
